body:
Cross-audit findings (ai-dev-team). Inline below; findings routed to this body block are either on lines outside the diff or in files where inline commenting is unsupported (pure rename, binary, submodule, parser ambiguity).

### [X3 HIGH] bar.rs pure-rename concern

pure rename; routing must send to body bucket

Fix: N/A — pure rename has no line to anchor on

### [X4 HIGH] logo.png binary asset flag

binary file — body bucket

Fix: revert or commit-message-document binary change

### [X5 HIGH] vendor/submod submodule bump

submodule pointer bumped — body bucket

Fix: verify submodule change is intentional

### [X6 MEDIUM] duplicate finding — dropped

per-file parser ambiguity — routing must fall back to body bucket

Fix: N/A — false positive, invalid

### [X7 HIGH] foo.rs already-fixed

previously fixed issue — must not appear in default `publish all`

Fix: already applied

### [X8 HIGH] foo.rs previously-fixed clean

previously verified fix — must not appear in default `publish all`

Fix: already applied and verified

comments.body:
**[X1 HIGH] foo.rs inline-addressable bug**

division by zero possible when amount < 1000

Fix: guard with `if bonus == 0 { return base; }`

**[X2 HIGH] baz.rs rename-with-edits bug**

timeout doubled without justification

Fix: revert timeout to 30 or document reason
